threat_log.AI_Remediation: "pickle" is unsafe. For serialization, swap to the "json" module.
Do not store "google_cloud_api_key" in plaintext. Use: os.getenv("GOOGLE_CLOUD_API_KEY")

threat_log.Vulnerability: User-controlled data passed directly into eval()
threat_log.AI_Remediation: NEVER pass raw user input to eval(). Use ast.literal_eval() for safe string parsing.
Refactor code to avoid dynamic execution entirely.
